title: The Battle "by the Water" / n 'Ali Calls Mu'.4wiyah to Obedience and Unity
description: The Battle "by the Water" / n 'Ali Calls Mu'.4wiyah to Obedience and Unity. Recorded under the year 37 AH (657–658 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 17.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 17
